steps.title: Apply the triangle inequality
steps.content: For side lengths $8$, $15$, and $x$, the sum of any two sides must be greater than the third side.

steps.title: Find the bounds on x
steps.content: The fixed sides give the upper bound: $8+15\gt x$, so $x\lt23$. The smaller fixed side plus $x$ must exceed the larger fixed side: $8+x\gt 15$, so $x\gt 7$.

steps.title: Combine and choose
steps.content: Together, the possible lengths are $7\lt x\lt23$. That confirms C is correct.
